utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The plan provides both physical and mental health entries with plan names and individual costs—fully specified. (2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides home_contents_insurance with plan name and cost—fully specified. (3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan lists two services with names and costs—fully specified. (5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides monthly and annual totals—fully specified. Therefore, 5/5 items are successfully included and specified.
